/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/liked_song_memories.dir/main.c.o -o liked_song_memories   -L/opt/homebrew/opt/notcurses/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/notcurses/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/curl/lib/libcurl.dylib _deps/cjson-build/libcjson.a -lm
